productDisplayName: Nike Men Dual Fusion TR III Grey Sports Shoes
description: Lightweight and versatile, the nike Dual Fusion TR III men's Training shoe is perfect for runners who have a neutral to slightly overpronated gait. It has a mesh upper to maximise airflow and a durable yet flexible outsole that delivers great traction on a variety of surfaces, meaning it doubles up as great walking shoe as well.UpperSoft, single-layer mesh for breathable comfortPerforated, internal Fit saddle work with lacing system for comfortable and snug fitStrategically placed overlays offer lightweight support to the midfoot regionSidewall wrap-up design cradles the heel and midfoot for stability and support during lateral movementGilly lacing system promotes a supportive, locked-in fitEVA sock-liner offers plush comfort and performanceMidsoleDual-density Phylon midsole has a softer foam in the center with firmer foam on the perimeter for a unique blend of lightweight cushioning and enhanced supportMoulded siping on the firmer density foam is designed to act as a crash pad for smoother transition from heel-strikeOutsoleSolid rubber outsole with multiple traction patterns for a smooth, sure-footed strideForefoot flex grooves for a more natural range of motionShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
